title: Patni Computer Systems is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Patni Computer Systems is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
